{{CargoRelic
|name=Seated Mazu Statue
|class_id=20239
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=The statue was produced at the Dehua Kiln in China, 33.2 cm in height, with a white glaze, smooth and bright. It depicts an image of loving Matsu in full dress that wears a beaded crown. Matsu is a fictional figure in the coastal regions in China, initially seen as the guardian of seafarers, later an almighty goddess who would rescue the suffering, respected by all China folks.
|fame=18
|art=14
|fth=30
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=B-tad rewards from offering +0.4%
|ss2=B-tad rewards from offering +0.8%
|ss3=B-tad rewards from offering +1.2%
|ss4=B-tad rewards from offering +1.2%
|ss7=B-tad rewards from offering +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
